title: stelis enervis
intro: Stelis enervis, a species of orchid, is a plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also known to provide health benefits including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, Stelis enervis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
